results.rendered_html: tithi m. f. ( Siddh. stry. 25 ) a lunar day (30th part of a whole lunation of rather more than 27 solar days; 15 Tithis, during the moon's increase, constitute the light half of the month and the other 15 the dark half; the auspicious Tithis are Nandā, Bhadrā, Vijayā, Pūrṇā,  VarBṛS. ic, 2 ),  Gobh. i f. ;  ŚāṅkhGṛ. ;  Mn.  &c.
